query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_ativas_com_telefone 
FROM gestantes g
WHERE g.telefone IS NOT NULL AND g.telefone != ''
AND g.id NOT IN (SELECT gestanteId FROM partos_realizados WHERE gestanteId IS NOT NULL);
